narrative:
Carroll County has 17,658 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 34.2% of registrants.
